title: Add same-lap field regime features
summary: Pit decisions are race-state decisions, not only driver-stint decisions.
rationale: Pit decisions are race-state decisions, not only driver-stint decisions. Strategy literature emphasizes traffic, safety-car/VSC, weather, and field interactions; even without external joins, same race-lap aggregates can expose mass pit windows, wet transitions, and pack disruption.
implementation_hint: Within each Race_Year-LapNumber, compute field counts and percentiles: number currently pitting, share on each compound, wet-weather share, median TyreLife, own TyreLife percentile, own LapTime_Delta z-score, Position_Change volatility, and whether nearby positions changed/pitted on the same lap.
expected_effect: Should improve detection of synchronized pit waves, safety-car-like disruptions, and compound-transition laps not captured by individual tyre age alone.
risk: If validation randomly splits rows, same-lap aggregates can look too good; use race-year grouped CV to estimate public behavior.
